metadata.description: Get a clean, safe Claude Code setup on any machine, then keep it healthy. Four skills: onboard (install skills, commands, hooks, MCP servers and merge settings.json without clobbering what you have), audit (validate an existing setup), config-wizard (interactively tune settings.json), and scaffold (generate ICM-structured projects). All work is driven through Claude — no scripts to run from a terminal.

plugins.name: claude-setup
plugins.description: Skill-driven onboarding, audit, settings.json wizard, and ICM scaffolder for Claude Code. Invoke /setup-onboard, /setup-audit, /setup-config-wizard, or /setup-scaffold. Non-destructive: settings.json is merged, never overwritten, and existing files are never clobbered.
